CustomField.formula:
IF( AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = "NATT_Performance_Parts" , NOT( OR( ISPICKVAL( NATT_Case_Reason__c , "Incorrect Manual"), ISPICKVAL( NATT_Case_Reason__c , "New Part Set-up"), ISPICKVAL( NATT_Case_Reason__c , "NSU/Pricing"), ISPICKVAL( NATT_Case_Reason__c , "Technical Question") )), NATT_Number_of_Case_Sales_Order_Records__c = 0 ), IMAGE("/img/samples/flag_red.gif", "red", 30, 30) &" Remember to add a Case Line Item record. Use the 'Add Case Line Items' quick action on the Feed for this record." ,IF( AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = "NATT_Service_Engineering_Field_Service" , ISPICKVAL( Type , "Engine Authorization Request"), NATT_EAR_Attached__c = 0 ), IMAGE("/img/samples/flag_red.gif", "red", 30, 30) &" Remember to add an Engine Authorization Request on the Related Tab." ,IF( AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = "CTM_Performance_Parts", NOT( OR( ISPICKVAL( CTM_Case_Reason__c , "Incorrect Manual"), ISPICKVAL( CTM_Case_Reason__c , "New Part Set-up"), ISPICKVAL( CTM_Case_Reason__c , "NSU/Pricing"), ISPICKVAL( CTM_Case_Reason__c , "Technical Question") )), NATT_Number_of_Case_Sales_Order_Records__c = 0 ), IMAGE("/img/samples/flag_red.gif", "red", 30, 30) &" Recuerde agregar el número de parte por línea de cada CASO. Use la acción rápida 'Agregar elementos de línea de caso' en el Feed para este registro." , IF( AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = "CTM_Service_Engineering_Field_Service" , NATT_EAR_Attached__c = 0 ), IMAGE("/img/samples/flag_red.gif", "red", 30, 30) &" Recuerde agregar una 'Solicitud de Autorización de Motor' en la pestaña Relacionado." , IF( AND(RecordType.DeveloperName = "CTBR_Parts_T_T", NATT_Number_of_Case_Sales_Order_Records__c = 0), IMAGE("/img/samples/flag_red.gif", "red", 30, 30) &" Lembre-se de adicionar um registro de item de linha de caso. Use a ação rápida 'Adicionar itens de linha do caso' no feed para este registro." ,"" )
) ) ) )
CustomField.label: Reminder
